meanings.definition: a sharp hand gesture (resembling a blow)
examples: he warned me with a jab with his finger
he made a thrusting motion with his fist
he jabbed his finger into her ribs

meanings.definition: search or inquire in a meddlesome way
examples: This guy is always nosing around the office
poke the embers in the fireplace

meanings.definition: hit hard with the hand, fist, or some heavy instrument
examples: the salesman pounded the door knocker
